text: > B Pl = | (f 1\ w o /z'li’!\.\‘{\li TN /:’/" /NIN“' /I.‘g«" ; /l‘ I | Dr Rich Read, PhD Doctors’ Wellbeing Officer Royal Perth Hospital [ graduated in veterinary science from University of Sydney in 1975 and after a few years in clinical practice started a life-time of educating, mentoring and encouraging veterinary students and graduates through various academic appointments in veterinary faculties in Australia and overseas. I am currently a mentor in the Graduate Mentor Scheme run through the Australian Veterinary Association. My mentoring experience extends into other aspects of my life, including helping to guide my four children as they have transitioned through university and into the workforce. I'am very excited to be starting this new position at RPH as the Doctors’ Wellbeing Officer. Ilook forward to working with you individually and as a group to help you not just survive your intern year, but to thrive and grow in all aspects of your development as young professionals. Contact: 0404039974 or wellbeingofficer.rph@health.wa.gov.au
